notes:
Used the recent Steam beta client to be able to use the Steam Play version over the native port since the native client was not updated to the latest version (8.4).
Using Steam Play did not break my save game (from my old windows version). The "configure" option when launching the game does not work.
Performance is really really great. Sound works. Not tested split screen with an emulator yet. Had a single (non reproducable) crash in the tavern so far. Have not tried any of the tweaks yet.
title: Dungeon Defenders

notes: As the native version is out of date, I needed to run the windows version to play with other windows payers. Without disabling Esync the mouse movement is not smooth and sometimes jumps around and the movement keys constantly get stuck. On an average of 2-3 times per map, the game crashes at random without any error. After disabling Esync I had no more problems.
title: Dungeon Defenders

notes: As mentioned, the Linux version doesn't work decently any more. Using the "Force the use of a specific Steam Play compatibility tool" checkbox made it run the Windows version, and I haven't had any issues whatsoever after 3 hours of play
title: Dungeon Defenders

notes: Works pretty well overall, has crashes every few hours, haven't had one since disabling esync
title: Dungeon Defenders
